name: @algiras/ak-coder
description: A hackable, hexagonal-architecture LLM agent harness for the terminal — connects to Ollama, OpenRouter, Gemini, Groq, DeepSeek, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --target bun --outfile dist/index.js --external react-devtools-core && chmod +x dist/index.js
